name: diff-ai
description: Compare texts, generate unified/context diffs, and create/apply patches. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: diff_texts
tools.description: Generate a unified diff between two text inputs.

tools.name: diff_files
tools.description: Generate a diff between two file contents in unified, context, or ndiff format.

tools.name: generate_patch
tools.description: Generate a patch file from original and modified text that can be applied with the apply_patch tool.

tools.name: apply_patch
tools.description: Apply a unified diff patch to the original text and return the result.
